items.title: Launching Health in ChatGPT
items.lead_paragraph: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.

items.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

items.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
items.lead_paragraph: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.

items.title: Advancing the next era of national science
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
items.lead_paragraph: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.

items.title: NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption.

items.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

items.title: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
items.lead_paragraph: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.

items.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

items.title: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
items.lead_paragraph: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission

items.title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.lead_paragraph: We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber.

items.title: Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
Supporting ambitious external research through the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We’re committing $200 million to the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund to support ambitious external research.

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Opus 5 is a step change improvement for the Opus tier powering long-running agents while delivering improvements in coding and professional work.

items.title: [dev] Claude for Creative Work
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks.

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: The Anthropic Economic Index connector
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We're launching the Anthropic Economic Index connector for Claude, which lets anyone explore the data directly.

items.title: Donating another $20 million to Public First Action
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is contributing an additional $20 million to Public First Action, bringing our total support to $40 million.

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

items.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

items.title: Introducing Agent Skills | Claude by Anthropic
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude can now use Skills to improve how it performs specific tasks. Skills are folders that include instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude can load when needed. Claude will only access a skill when it's relevant to the task at hand.

items.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is the best coding model in the world, strongest model for building complex agents, and best model at using computers.

items.title: Introducing Claude Haiku 4.5
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude Haiku 4.5, our latest small model, is available today to all users.

items.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

items.title: Introducing Claude for Small Business
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We're launching Claude for Small Business, a package of connectors and ready-to-run workflows that put Claude inside the tools small businesses use every day.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.
